nasb.text: and the sons of Israel set out on their journeys from the wilderness of Sinai. Then the cloud settled down in the wilderness of Paran.

esv.text: and the people of Israel set out by stages from the wilderness of Sinai. And the cloud settled down in the wilderness of Paran.

cnv.text: 以色列人就從西奈曠野按站起行；雲彩在巴蘭曠野停住了。

ccb.text: 以色列人就从西奈旷野启行，直到云彩停在巴兰旷野时才停下来。
